proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +42.5pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
D-8 R-multiple review pending; if forced-exit dominance is resolved, R-multiple may re-classify cohort — monitor next archive
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +42.5pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +42.5pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below the Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 4), so the cohort is dormant and no concentration trigger is active (observed 0.75 below 0.80). Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-07-07) and no trader rejection on record.

claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +29.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate

risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3

approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +29.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +29.9pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 4), so the cohort is dormant; portfolio has 0 Bear exposure and no concentration trigger active (0.75 below 0.80), so promotion does not compound risk. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 07-07) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_signal_type×regime×sector = UP_TRI × Choppy × Pharma (37.5%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_signal_type×regime×sector = UP_TRI × Choppy × Pharma; recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND sector=Pharma until the concentrated cell drops below 0.20 via natural Day-6 exits; hedge Pharma sector exposure if regime shifts away from Choppy.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Pharma-specific adverse catalyst (regulatory, pricing) or a regime shift out of Choppy would hit 5 of 8 positions simultaneously, with 3 of those concentrated in the same unvalidated UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell — correlated drawdown across nearly the entire book with no validated edge to justify the exposure.

evidence: UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell at 37.5% (3 of 8), well above the 0.20 cell threshold
Pharma sector holds 5 of 8 positions (62.5%) — sector-specific tail risk
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort at Candidate tier only (n=294) — unvalidated edge
Regime concentration Choppy 75% (below 0.80 threshold but elevated)
All six concentration cells match only Candidate-tier cohorts — no validated edge anywhere in book
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND sector=Pharma until the concentrated cell drops below 0.20 via natural Day-6 exits; hedge Pharma sector exposure if regime shifts away from Choppy.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Pharma-specific adverse catalyst (regulatory, pricing) or a regime shift out of Choppy would hit 5 of 8 positions simultaneously, with 3 of those concentrated in the same unvalidated UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell — correlated drawdown across nearly the entire book with no validated edge to justify the exposure.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: UP_TRI × Choppy × Pharma cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 37.5% (3 of 8 positions), and the matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=294) — unvalidated edge. Pharma sector also dominates at 5/8 = 62.5% of the book, compounding sector-specific tail risk. Regime concentration (Choppy 75%) and signal-type mix (UP_TRI 62.5%) are within tolerance, but the cell breach on an unvalidated cohort is the actionable risk.
